channel.title: About Me on the diary of amuldotexe
channel.description: Recent content in About Me on the diary of amuldotexe

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hi I am amuldotexe Have been working in tech since 2010 Currently working in a product role at a large US based company This website is a collection of my notes on various topics Hope this is useful to you My twitter profile My Linkedin profile
